title_en: 1. The first opinion is that it is binding. This is the view of
content_en: Maik and of ash-Shifa'i in his old madh-hab; it is also the view of *mad according to one report narrated from him. It is the view of most of the scholars and jurists among the Hanafis; Ibn 'Aqeel among the Hanbalis; a l - ' ~ l Z ' i ~ ~ ~ and al-Khateeb al-Baghdadi among the Shifa'is. It was the view favoured by Ibn al-Qayyim in I'lcim al- Muwaqqi'een, ash-ShZtibi in al-Muwcifaqcit, and Ibn ~ a ~ r n i ~ a h . ~ ~ ~
